cases.name: git_diff
cases.input:
diff --git a/src/lib.rs b/src/lib.rs
index 111..222 100644
--- a/src/lib.rs
+++ b/src/lib.rs
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 context line
-old value
+new value
cases.expected_output:
Files changed: 1
  src/lib.rs

--- a/src/lib.rs
+++ b/src/lib.rs
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-old value
+new value

cases.name: git_status_porcelain
cases.input:
M src/lib.rs
A  src/main.rs
?? README.md
cases.expected_output:
M src/lib.rs
A  src/main.rs
?? README.md

cases.name: git_status_conflict_and_rename
cases.input:
UU src/conflict.rs
R  src/old.rs -> src/new.rs
?? notes.txt
cases.expected_output:
UU src/conflict.rs
R  src/old.rs -> src/new.rs
?? notes.txt

cases.name: git_diff_rename
cases.input:
diff --git a/src/old.rs b/src/new.rs
similarity index 100%
rename from src/old.rs
rename to src/new.rs
cases.expected_output:
Files changed: 1
  src/old.rs

cases.name: git_log_merge
cases.input:
commit abcdef1234567890
Author: Dev <dev@example.test>
Date: Thu May 28 12:00:00 2026 -0500

    initial commit
commit 123456abcdef7890
Merge: 1111111 2222222
Author: Dev <dev@example.test>
Date: Thu May 28 13:00:00 2026 -0500

    merge branch
cases.expected_output:
commit abcde initial commit
commit 12345 (merge) merge branch

cases.name: cargo_build

input_parts.text:
error[E0425]: cannot find value `missing` in this scope
 --> src/lib.rs:7:5
  |
7 |     missing
  |     ^^^^^^^ not found in this scope

cases.expected_output:
Errors (1):
error[E0425]: cannot find value `missing` in this scope
 --> src/lib.rs:7:5
  |
7 |     missing
  |     ^^^^^^^ not found in this scope

cases.name: cargo_build_multi_diagnostic

input_parts.text:
warning[clippy::needless_return]: unneeded return statement
 --> src/lib.rs:3:5
  |
3 |     return value;
  |     ^^^^^^^^^^^^

error[E0308]: mismatched types
 --> src/lib.rs:8:5
  |
8 |     "wrong"
  |     ^^^^^^^ expected i32

error: could not compile `demo` due to previous error

cases.expected_output:
Errors (2):
error[E0308]: mismatched types
 --> src/lib.rs:8:5
  |
8 |     "wrong"
  |     ^^^^^^^ expected i32


error: could not compile `demo` due to previous error
Warnings (1):
warning[clippy::needless_return]: unneeded return statement
 --> src/lib.rs:3:5
  |
3 |     return value;
  |     ^^^^^^^^^^^^

cases.name: cargo_test_failure
cases.input:
running 2 tests
test alpha ... ok
test beta ... FAILED

failures:
    beta

test result: FAILED. 1 passed; 1 failed; 0 ignored; finished in 0.01s
cases.expected_output:
FAILURES (1):
test beta ... FAILED
running 2 tests
test result: FAILED. 1 passed; 1 failed; 0 ignored; finished in 0.01s

cases.name: cargo_json_diagnostic
cases.expected_output: (compiled successfully)

cases.name: rustc_diagnostic
cases.input:
error[E0308]: mismatched types
 --> src/lib.rs:2:5
  |
2 |     "wrong"
  |     ^^^^^^^ expected i32, found &str

error: aborting due to previous error
cases.expected_output:
error[E0308]: mismatched types
 --> src/lib.rs:2:5
  |
2 |     "wrong"
  |     ^^^^^^^ expected i32, found &str

error: aborting due to previous error

src/a.ts:1:1 error no-console

2 problems

cases.input:
FAIL src/foo.test.ts
Error: boom
    at Object.<anonymous> (src/foo.test.ts:1:1)

Test Suites: 1 failed, 1 total
Tests: 1 failed, 1 total
cases.expected_output:
Error: boom
Test Suites: 1 failed, 1 total
Tests: 1 failed, 1 total

cases.name: yarn_test_failure
cases.input:
yarn run v1.22.22
$ vitest run
FAIL src/foo.test.ts
Error: expected true to be false

Test Files 1 failed (1)
Tests 1 failed (1)
error Command failed with exit code 1.
cases.expected_output:
Error: expected true to be false
Test Files 1 failed (1)
Tests 1 failed (1)
error Command failed with exit code 1.

cases.name: bun_test_failure
cases.input:
bun test v1.1.0
src/foo.test.ts:
(fail) adds numbers [0.12ms]
  expect(received).toBe(expected)

1 fail
2 pass
error: script "test" exited with code 1
cases.expected_output: error: script "test" exited with code 1

cases.name: pytest_param_failure
cases.input:
___ test_adds_numbers[1-2-4] ___

left = 1, right = 2, expected = 4

    assert add(left, right) == expected
E   assert 3 == 4

FAILED tests/test_math.py::test_adds_numbers[1-2-4] - AssertionError
1 failed, 8 passed in 0.04s

FAILURES (1):

___ test_adds_numbers[1-2-4] ___

1 failed, 8 passed in 0.04s
